nasb.text: So if you have law courts dealing with matters of this life, do you appoint them as judges who are of no account in the church?

esv.text: So if you have such cases, why do you lay them before those who have no standing in the church?

cnv.text: 你們既然要審判今生的事，為甚麼讓教會不重視的人來審判呢？

ccb.text: 如果你们有什么纠纷，你们会指派不受教会敬重的人来审理吗？

csbs.text: 因此，你们如果真有今生的事要审理，难道让被教会所藐视的这些人来审吗？
